subject: Fix build & update harkari-cp to 2.7.2
commit_message:
Fix build & update harkari-cp to 2.7.2

Issue-ID: SO-2038
Change-Id: I96209f974d6f98eb6d27f8b0ae8d26f6d9ebb313
Signed-off-by: Marcus G K Williams <marcus.williams@intel.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/so-master-verify-java/2287/ : FAILURE

Build failed to find artifact hikari-cp:hikari-cp:jar:2.7.2 needed for sub-project org.onap.so:common:jar:1.4.0-SNAPSHOT. Check correct groupId, artifactId and version. This may also indicate a problem with nexus. Another possibility is that this is a -SNAPSHOT version and it has expired from nexus -- in that case check with the project which provides the artifact. ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/so-master-verify-java/2287/ )

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/so-master-verify-java/2287

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-2

It looks like the dependency we need is actually hikari-cp and not HikariCP. Nexus seems to only have version up to 2.4.0 https://nexus.onap.org/content/groups/public/hikari-cp/hikari-cp/ . Sending an email to LF about missing dependency. 

Hikari CP » 2.7.1
A Clojure wrapper to HikariCP JDBC connection pool

License	EPL 1.0
HomePage	https://github.com/tomekw/hikari-cp
Date	(Mar 10, 2019)
Files	jar (13 KB)  View All
Repositories	Clojars
Used By	36 artifacts

<!-- https://mvnrepository.com/artifact/hikari-cp/hikari-cp -->
<dependency>
    <groupId>hikari-cp</groupId>
    <artifactId>hikari-cp</artifactId>
    <version>2.7.1</version>
</dependency>

Abandoned

Need LF intervention, not update of version.
